item.title: Good bye for now
item.description: I was arrested 2 years ago for possession of a large amount of mophine, co codamale and other prescription drugs. Since then I have gotten a job (I was unemployed at the time), got my own place (was living with a friend who is the one who called the cops). I have done everything I could have to better my self, the only thing I couldn't do was private rehab because I couldn't afford it. The prosecution wants 2 years. My solicitor thinks I'll get a suspended sentence. I keep trying to calm myself by repeating my mitigating circumstances. I was under 25 I am remorseful I have mental health issues Was the victim of sexual assault as a child I have great job prospects. I had a shit upbringing. In less than 24hrs I will know my fate. If this is it, thank you for making this app the place I go to to relax. If I don't post by this time tomorrow, well you'll know the outcome. Good bye for now. I love you guys I want to clarify, this is my first offence and I was not selling and the police know this. I was only charged with possession. I never had a desire to sell.
item.dc:creator: thetinymonarch

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
all over the place
everyone needs that
every time
cursed device
https://www.newscientist.com/article/2078781-wild-gorillas-compose-happy-songs-that-they-hum-during-meals/
i guess
pathetic
sorry about this one
yes it does
yes?
wonder what rude language was uttered
mmm hmm
i did not
he tried his best ok
could have fooled me
this exact thing happened to me
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.dc:creator: nickontop

item.title: Yesterday in a fit of frustration about the state of things here in los Estados Unidos, I posted some of my drapings here instead of on meta. I didn’t know how you - imgur would respond- and i would say so far its been a mixed bag.
item.description:
But i am not a total newb here - and so I brought a banana for scale and I put it in a pocket because, yes- we are excited to see you ?
This is a silk and Australian wool blend herringbone woven that reads overall grey. Outstanding drape and hand.
item.dc:creator: thereoncewasamanfromnantucket

item.title: So satisfying to see the cube fit so perfectly
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Image says it all
item.description: I used Imgur when I was deployed as well. It helps to laugh at shit posts. Even in 2009 Imgur was awesome. I come back to shitpost once in a while when I’m having a hard time. I had a feeling today I haven’t had in a while. I felt like I was about to be hit by something. That feeling is what started my panic attacks and my diagnoses after Iraq. Writing helps a lot. Thanks for reading
item.dc:creator: comingfromdistrict12

item.title: Nooobooodyy waaants*... the trouble I've seen...!
item.dc:creator: Az663

item.title: Can somebody find Jeremy and bring him to Imgur so we can let him know he’s loved?
item.description: Sorry about the watermark I got this from threads I feel so bad for this young man He seems so nice He deserves to be loved Edit: Someone found his YouTube if you want to stop by and say Hi to him: https://www.youtube.com/@jdanielhopper
item.dc:creator: CapttainKillJoy

item.title: Images of Note: Aware of Princess
item.description:
yes
pet her you monster
I DON'T CARE IF IT'S THURSDAY, IT IS WEDNESDAY FOR THIS MEME AND THIS MEME ONLY
Trump has made everyone female!
Mr Beast only smiles from the bottom down.
monch
"Check in the back." "I already have for someone else." "Can you check again?"
There's a Red Weather Warning where I live and predictions of Tornadoes! This fact is causing someone on the discord server to have an existential crisis.
there's no windows in this waiting room.
Wonder which Trump official threatened them?
Linux Users
How long until Trump and others start suing other countries for calling it the Gulf of Mexico.
m o n c h
SOUND ON
The restraint I show in not @everyone-ing cursed images I find.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips! now if you excuse me, I have to go practice my gaelic.
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Mentally healthy dump
item.description: I didn't organize this one as I generally do. Sometimes when I'm feeling a bit low I just don't post because I don't really have the energy to care enough to do it. However, I figure still it potentially could help more people than it could harm so, here we are. You don't have to be loved to have value. Just saying. -comet
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet

If you'd like to support me with a $5 donation, I will include your name in it as a thank-you. Have a great day! Ko-fi.com/gryzlock Cheers.
